name: check_model_against_employer_requirements
desc: Check the current Revit model against Employer's Requirements (ERs). Reads an ER document and validates compliance. Supports JSON and text ER files. Use context tools (list_levels, list_systems, get_document_info, etc.) to check each requirement after reading.

parameters.name: er_path
parameters.description: Path to the Employer's Requirements file (JSON or text). If not provided, uses the default ER directory.
